title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at HP India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at HP India
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
